det_check_template:
proof fn det_new_thread(pre_self_: ProcessManager, proc_ptr: ProcPtr, pt_regs: Registers, page_ptr: PagePtr, page_perm: Tracked<PagePerm4k>, post1_self_: ProcessManager, r1: ThreadPtr, post2_self_: ProcessManager, r2: ThreadPtr)
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_.proc_dom().contains(proc_ptr)), (pre_self_.page_closure().contains(page_ptr) == false), (pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).owned_threads.len() < MAX_NUM_THREADS_PER_PROC), (pre_self_.get_container_by_proc_ptr(proc_ptr).quota.mem_4k > 0), (pre_self_.get_container_by_proc_ptr(proc_ptr).scheduler.len()
                < MAX_CONTAINER_SCHEDULER_LEN), (page_perm@.is_init()), (page_perm@.addr() == page_ptr),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.page_closure() =~= pre_self_.page_closure().insert(page_ptr))
            &&& (post1_self_.proc_dom() =~= pre_self_.proc_dom())
            &&& (post1_self_.endpoint_dom() == pre_self_.endpoint_dom())
            &&& (post1_self_.container_dom() == pre_self_.container_dom())
            &&& (post1_self_.thread_dom() == pre_self_.thread_dom().insert(r1))
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.spec_subtract_mem_4k(
                post1_self_.get_container(post1_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).owning_container).quota,
                1,
            ))
            &&& (pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).pcid =~= post1_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).pcid)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).ioid =~= post1_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).ioid)
            &&& (forall|p_ptr: ProcPtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_proc(p_ptr)]
                post1_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr) && p_ptr != proc_ptr ==> post1_self_.get_proc(p_ptr)
                    =~= pre_self_.get_proc(p_ptr))
            &&& (forall|container_ptr: ContainerPtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_container(container_ptr).owned_procs]
                post1_self_.container_dom().contains(container_ptr) && container_ptr != post1_self_.get_proc(
                    proc_ptr,
                ).owning_container ==> post1_self_.get_container(container_ptr).owned_procs =~= pre_self_.get_container(container_ptr).owned_procs)
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_.page_closure() =~= pre_self_.page_closure().insert(page_ptr))
            &&& (post2_self_.proc_dom() =~= pre_self_.proc_dom())
            &&& (post2_self_.endpoint_dom() == pre_self_.endpoint_dom())
            &&& (post2_self_.container_dom() == pre_self_.container_dom())
            &&& (post2_self_.thread_dom() == pre_self_.thread_dom().insert(r2))
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.spec_subtract_mem_4k(
                post2_self_.get_container(post2_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).owning_container).quota,
                1,
            ))
            &&& (pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).pcid =~= post2_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).pcid)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).ioid =~= post2_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).ioid)
            &&& (forall|p_ptr: ProcPtr|
                #![trigger post2_self_.get_proc(p_ptr)]
                post2_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr) && p_ptr != proc_ptr ==> post2_self_.get_proc(p_ptr)
                    =~= pre_self_.get_proc(p_ptr))
            &&& (forall|container_ptr: ContainerPtr|
                #![trigger post2_self_.get_container(container_ptr).owned_procs]
                post2_self_.container_dom().contains(container_ptr) && container_ptr != post2_self_.get_proc(
                    proc_ptr,
                ).owning_container ==> post2_self_.get_container(container_ptr).owned_procs =~= pre_self_.get_container(container_ptr).owned_procs)
        }) ==> det_new_thread_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_),
{
{ASSUMES}}
